PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-04-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DMA CLAIMS SERVICE, ANDREW BENTON, SENIOR INVESTIGATOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DMA CLAIMS SERVICE, ANDREW BENTON, SENIOR INVESTIGATOR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SENNO, LOUIS SENNO, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DMA CLAIMS SERVICE, ANDREW BENTON, SENIOR INVESTIGATOR THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE COVERAGE FOR THE SUBJECT INCIDENT WAS LIMITED TO THE UNINSURED MOTORIST COVERAGE OF $3,500 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
